summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Badminton AI Analyzer app. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. The bug fix for incomplete AI analysis data (null values) has been verified - all analysis fields are now populated correctly.

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect has missing dependencies (fetchAnalysis, fetchTrainingPlan) - minor code quality issue

critical_code_review_comments: AnalysisPage.js line 24: useEffect missing dependencies - should add fetchAnalysis and fetchTrainingPlan to dependency array or use useCallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs tested: GET /api/, GET /api/analyses, GET /api/analyses/{id}, GET /api/videos/{id}, POST /api/analyze. Frontend pages tested: HomePage (upload form), HistoryPage (analysis list), AnalysisPage (full analysis display with technique_details, footwork_details, biomechanics, strengths, weaknesses, recommendations). Test video at /tmp/test_badminton.mp4 can be used for upload testing.

backend_tests: test_get_specific_analysis - PASSED (verified technique_score, footwork_score, strengths, weaknesses, technique_details, footwork_details, biomechanics are NOT null)
test_analyze_video_upload - PASSED (verified complete analysis data returned)
frontend_tests: HomePage - Hero title, subtitle, upload area, upload button, history link, feature cards - ALL PASSED
HistoryPage - Title, back button, analysis cards with scores and strengths - ALL PASSED

AnalysisPage - Title, video player, technique/footwork scores, technique_details, footwork_details, strengths, weaknesses, recommendations, biomechanics, singles info, training plan button - ALL PASSED
Navigation flow - Upload button clickable, history link navigation, back button - ALL PASSED

bug_fix_verification.issue: AI analysis was returning incomplete data (null values) due to incorrect JSON regex parsing
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Backend test test_get_specific_analysis verifies all analysis fields are NOT null. POST /api/analyze test verifies new uploads return complete data.
